---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "feat: <short summary>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behaviour you would like to see. Include UI sketches or
command-line examples if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you have thought about and why you rejected them.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, related issues, etc.
